summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chef movie recommendation app's proportion percentage feature in My Movies > Profile section. All requested features are working correctly including proportion badges, role badges, and stats summary.

minor_fixes_applied.issue: Profile insights cache not returning stats object
minor_fixes_applied.fix: Updated cached response to include stats object alongside genres, actors, directors

passed_tests: Backend API - User authentication with test credentials working
Backend API - Profile insights endpoint returns proportion_index for all categories
Backend API - Genres have franchise_count and standalone_count fields
Backend API - Actors have primary_role, franchise_appearances, standalone_appearances fields
Backend API - Directors have franchise_count and standalone_count fields
Backend API - Stats object contains total_movies_watched, franchises_watched, standalone_movies
Frontend - My Movies page loads correctly with diary entries
Frontend - Profile tab displays and is accessible via data-testid='tab-profile'
Frontend - Top Genres section displays with proportion percentage badges
Frontend - Proportion badges show green for above average (+X% vs avg format)
Frontend - Top Actors section displays with role badges (Lead/Supporting/Background)
Frontend - Actor entries show proportion percentage badges
Frontend - Top Directors section displays with proportion percentage badges
Frontend - Stats summary shows Total Films, Franchises, and Standalone counts
Frontend - All proportion calculations working (tested 5 genres, 3 actors, 4 directors)
Integration - Backend proportion_index values correctly displayed as percentage badges
Integration - Role classification working (all test actors showing 'Background' role)
Integration - Stats integration working (3 total films, 0 franchises, 3 standalone)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All proportion percentage API features working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components displaying proportion badges and role badges correctly
